description: Financial RL workflow definitions for equity trading, portfolio allocation, and derivatives hedging.

get_market_state.description: Fetch current price, volume, and 12 technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger, momentum, volatility, moving averages)

execute_trade.description: Execute a buy/sell/hold trade with automatic position sizing, transaction costs (10 bps), and slippage (5 bps)
requires: action must be integer in {0: strong_sell, 1: sell, 2: hold, 3: buy, 4: strong_buy}

get_portfolio_status.description: Get current portfolio value, P&L, position size, drawdown from peak, Sharpe ratio, and trade count

get_asset_returns.description: Fetch multi-asset return history with configurable lookback window for all 5 correlated assets

rebalance_portfolio.description: Set target portfolio weights across 5 assets. Weights normalized to sum to 1. Transaction costs applied to turnover.
requires: weights must be array of 5 floats summing to 1.0

get_risk_metrics.description: Get portfolio Sharpe ratio, rolling volatility, maximum drawdown, current weights, and total return

get_option_greeks.description: Fetch Black-Scholes delta, gamma, current moneyness (S/K), time to expiry, and implied volatility

adjust_hedge.description: Set the hedge ratio for the options position. 0=no hedge, 1=full BS delta hedge. Transaction costs applied to changes.

get_pnl_status.description: Get current hedging P&L, P&L variance, hedge position size, and hedging error relative to BS delta

workflows.title: Apex Equities Desk
workflows.description: Directional equity trading using technical signals -- momentum, mean-reversion, and regime detection
rules: Tool order must be respected: observe before trading
Portfolio value must stay above ruin threshold (50%)

scenarios.title: Buy the Dip
scenarios.description: RSI drops below 0.30 (oversold). Agent must buy and exit when RSI normalizes.

scenarios.title: Trend Following
scenarios.description: 5-day MA crosses above 20-day MA. Agent must enter long and ride the trend.

scenarios.title: Mean Reversion Trade
scenarios.description: Price deviates >2 std from mean. Agent must fade the move.

scenarios.title: Momentum Scalping
scenarios.description: Strong 10-day momentum (>3%). Quick directional trades.

scenarios.title: Volatile Market Navigation
scenarios.description: Volatility spikes above 30%. Reduce exposure and preserve capital.

scenarios.title: Drawdown Recovery
scenarios.description: Portfolio declined 15% from peak. Recover without increasing risk.

scenarios.title: Regime Change Adaptation
scenarios.description: Market switches from bull to bear mid-episode. Detect and adapt.

scenarios.title: Cost-Aware Trading
scenarios.description: High transaction cost (50 bps). Minimize trade frequency.

scenarios.title: Full Episode Optimization
scenarios.description: Complete ~500 step episode. Maximize Sharpe ratio.

scenarios.title: Earnings Shock Response
scenarios.description: Sudden 5% price gap. Decide: hold, cut losses, or add.

workflows.title: Apex Multi-Asset Allocator
workflows.description: Dynamic portfolio weight optimization across 5 correlated asset classes with cost-aware rebalancing

scenarios.title: Equal Weight Baseline
scenarios.description: Maintain equal weights [0.20 x 5]. Baseline for comparison.

scenarios.title: Concentrated Bet
scenarios.description: Identify best asset, allocate 80%+. High risk, high reward.

scenarios.title: Risk Parity Allocation
scenarios.description: Allocate inversely to volatility. Lower-vol gets more.

scenarios.title: Correlation Regime Shift
scenarios.description: Correlations change mid-episode (0.3 to 0.8). Adapt.

scenarios.title: Low-Turnover Optimization
scenarios.description: Maximize return with turnover < 20%. Elevated costs.

scenarios.title: Tail Risk Hedging
scenarios.description: One asset has fat tails (t-dist df=3). Limit exposure.

scenarios.title: Multi-Objective: Return + ESG
scenarios.description: Maximize return with green assets > 40%.

scenarios.title: Crisis Allocation
scenarios.description: Bear market across all assets. Find least-bad allocation.

scenarios.title: Dynamic Rebalancing
scenarios.description: Full episode with monthly rebalancing on rolling metrics.

scenarios.title: Markowitz vs RL
scenarios.description: Compare RL weights against mean-variance optimal.

workflows.title: Apex Derivatives Hedging
workflows.description: Intelligent delta hedging for options book with stochastic volatility and transaction cost optimization
rules: Cannot leave position fully unhedged for >3 steps
Total hedging costs must stay within budget
Terminal payoff must be within tolerance of theoretical

scenarios.title: Full Delta Hedge
scenarios.description: Maintain hedge ratio = BS delta at every step. Baseline.

scenarios.title: Static Hedge
scenarios.description: Set hedge once and hold. No rebalancing.

scenarios.title: Cost-Aware Hedging
scenarios.description: Transaction cost = 50 bps. Hedge less frequently.

scenarios.title: Stochastic Volatility
scenarios.description: Vol follows Heston dynamics. Adapt to changing vol.

scenarios.title: Deep In-the-Money
scenarios.description: S/K = 1.20, delta near 1. Maintain tight hedge.

scenarios.title: Deep Out-of-Money
scenarios.description: S/K = 0.80, delta near 0. Avoid over-hedging.

scenarios.title: Gamma Scalping
scenarios.description: Near expiry, gamma spikes. Adjust rapidly.

scenarios.title: Volatility Spike
scenarios.description: Vol jumps from 20% to 50% mid-episode. React.

scenarios.title: Multi-Option Book
scenarios.description: Hedge options with different strikes. Manage net delta.

scenarios.title: P&L Variance Minimization
scenarios.description: Minimize daily P&L variance, not just terminal.

verifier_definitions.name: Return Threshold
verifier_definitions.description: Total return must exceed minimum threshold

verifier_definitions.name: Hedging Error
verifier_definitions.description: Hedge ratio close to BS delta on average
